name: Immunoprecipitation (IP)

components.name: 1. 裂解细胞 (IP Lysis Buffer + protease inhibitors)
components.note: 冰上 30 min, 间歇涡旋

components.name: 3. 定量 → 取 500 µg–1 mg 总蛋白
4. 预清除 (Protein A/G beads, 4°C, 1 h)
components.note: 去除非特异结合; 可选

components.name: 6. 加抗体 (1–5 µg) → 4°C 旋转孵育 2–4 h 或过夜
7. 加 Protein A/G beads (20–40 µL) → 4°C 旋转 1–2 h
8. 洗涤 3–5 次 (Lysis Buffer, 4°C)
components.note: 每次 1 mL, 旋转 5 min, 磁力架吸附

components.name: 9. 洗脱: 2× SDS Loading Buffer, 95°C 5 min
10. Western Blot 检测
components.note: IP 样品 + Input + IgG 对照

notes.en: Controls: (1) Normal IgG (same species) negative control; (2) Input positive control. For Co-IP: use mild lysis buffer (avoid SDS). Ab light/heavy chain interference in WB: use Clean-Blot IP Detection Reagent or crosslink Ab to beads. Magnetic beads have lower background than agarose. Endogenous IP is more physiologically relevant than overexpression IP.
notes.zh: 对照：(1) Normal IgG (同种属) 阴性对照; (2) Input 阳性对照。共免疫沉淀 (Co-IP)：使用温和裂解液（避免 SDS）。抗体轻链/重链干扰 WB 检测：用 Clean-Blot IP Detection Reagent 或交联抗体到 beads。磁珠比琼脂糖珠背景更低。内源性 IP 比 overexpression IP 更有生理意义。

ref: Harlow & Lane (1988) Antibodies: A Laboratory Manual; Cell Signaling Technology IP Protocol

usage.en: Immunoprecipitate a target protein from cell lysates using antibody-bead capture.
usage.zh: 抗体-磁珠捕获法从细胞裂解液中免疫沉淀靶蛋白。

briefSteps.en: Lyse cells in IP lysis buffer → centrifuge and clarify → quantify lysate, save input → pre-clear with beads → add target antibody overnight at 4°C → add Protein A/G beads 1–2 h → wash 3–5× → elute with 2× SDS loading buffer at 95°C → Western blot.
briefSteps.zh: IP 裂解液裂解细胞 → 离心澄清 → 定量裂解液并留取 Input → beads 预清除 → 加目标抗体 4°C 过夜 → Protein A/G beads 孵育 1–2 h → 洗涤 3–5 次 → 2× SDS 上样缓冲液 95°C 洗脱 → Western Blot 检测。

detailedSteps.en: Wash cells twice with ice-cold PBS. Add IP lysis buffer (150 mM NaCl, 50 mM Tris-HCl pH 7.5, 1% NP-40, 0.5% sodium deoxycholate, 1 mM EDTA) supplemented with protease inhibitor cocktail and phosphatase inhibitors if needed. Use 300–500 µL per 10-cm dish. Lyse on ice for 30 min with occasional vortexing.
detailedSteps.zh: 冰冷 PBS 洗细胞两次，加 IP 裂解液（150 mM NaCl、50 mM Tris-HCl pH 7.5、1% NP-40、0.5% 脱氧胆酸钠、1 mM EDTA + 蛋白酶抑制剂，必要时加磷酸酶抑制剂），10 cm 皿用 300–500 µL，冰上裂解 30 min，间歇涡旋。

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge at 14,000×g for 15 min at 4°C. Carefully transfer the supernatant to a new pre-chilled Eppendorf tube. Discard the pellet.
detailedSteps.zh: 4°C 14,000×g 离心 15 min，小心将上清转移至新的预冷 Eppendorf 管，弃去沉淀。

detailedSteps.en: Quantify protein concentration by BCA or Bradford assay. Use 500 µg–1 mg total protein per IP reaction. Remove 5–10% of the lysate as Input control and add 1× Laemmli loading buffer; boil and store at −20°C.
detailedSteps.zh: BCA 或 Bradford 法定量蛋白浓度，每个 IP 反应取 500 µg–1 mg 总蛋白，留取 5–10% 裂解液作为 Input 对照，加 1× Laemmli 缓冲液后煮沸，−20°C 保存。

detailedSteps.en: Pre-clear the lysate: add 20 µL of Protein A/G magnetic beads (pre-washed 3× in lysis buffer) and rotate at 4°C for 1 h. Apply magnetic rack and transfer supernatant to a new tube, discarding beads.
detailedSteps.zh: 预清除：加 20 µL Protein A/G 磁珠（预洗 3 次），4°C 旋转孵育 1 h，用磁力架吸附磁珠，将上清转移至新管。

detailedSteps.en: Add 1–5 µg of target antibody to the pre-cleared lysate. Prepare an isotype-matched IgG negative control in a parallel tube with the same amount of normal IgG. Rotate all tubes at 4°C overnight.
detailedSteps.zh: 向预清除后的裂解液中加入 1–5 µg 目标抗体，平行设置同量同种属 IgG 阴性对照管，4°C 旋转孵育过夜。

detailedSteps.en: Add 20–40 µL of pre-washed Protein A/G magnetic beads to each tube. Rotate at 4°C for 1–2 h to capture the antibody-antigen complex.
detailedSteps.zh: 每管加入 20–40 µL 预洗 Protein A/G 磁珠，4°C 旋转孵育 1–2 h 捕获抗体-抗原复合物。

detailedSteps.en: Place tubes on magnetic rack. Remove and discard supernatant. Wash beads 3–5 times: add 1 mL cold lysis buffer, rotate for 5 min at 4°C, apply magnetic rack, discard supernatant. Final wash: use PBS for a cleaner elution.
detailedSteps.zh: 置于磁力架上弃上清，洗涤 beads 3–5 次：加 1 mL 冰冷裂解液，4°C 旋转 5 min，磁力架吸附后弃上清，末次可用 PBS 洗涤使洗脱更干净。

detailedSteps.en: Elute by adding 40–50 µL of 2× Laemmli sample buffer to beads. Boil at 95°C for 5 min. Apply magnetic rack and carefully transfer supernatant (eluate) to a new tube.
detailedSteps.zh: 向 beads 中加入 40–50 µL 2× Laemmli 上样缓冲液，95°C 煮沸 5 min，磁力架吸附后小心将上清（洗脱液）转入新管。

detailedSteps.en: Resolve IP eluates (IP sample, IgG control) and Input by SDS-PAGE, then transfer to membrane and perform Western blot. Probe for the target protein. Include Input as positive control to verify antibody and protein expression.
detailedSteps.zh: 将 IP 洗脱液（IP 样品、IgG 对照）和 Input 跑 SDS-PAGE 后转膜，Western Blot 检测目标蛋白，以 Input 为阳性对照验证抗体和蛋白表达。

note.en: Clarified cell lysate can be snap-frozen in liquid nitrogen and stored at −80°C for up to 1 month.
note.zh: 澄清的细胞裂解液可液氮速冻后 −80°C 保存最长 1 个月。

note.en: IP eluates in Laemmli buffer can be stored at −20°C for up to 1 month before Western blot analysis.
note.zh: Laemmli 缓冲液中的 IP 洗脱液可 −20°C 保存最长 1 个月，再进行 Western Blot。
